scopeLabel: <the Linear label the ticket-flow commands filter on, e.g. 'pipeline'>
notes: Per-repo binding for the ticket-flow commands (/next-ticket, /scope, /build, /land-ticket, /spawn-tickets, /harvest-*, /capture, /align, /refresh-landscape, /trace-audit). Copy to <repo>/.claude/ticket-flow.json and fill in — or run /ticket-flow-init, which detects most of it. Key notes: bugBucket/deferredChecksBucket must already exist in Linear under their OWNING team (create once, apply the 'parallel' project label in Linear's UI — project labels are UI-only). landscapeTeams is the in-scope team set /refresh-landscape + /trace-audit sweep (omit to fall back to linearTeam). intake is the /capture + /align funnel binding (omit if you don't run a product-idea funnel). deployedServices is the /land-ticket §6.7b redeploy ack-gate registry — declare per-service {name, covers, redeploy, verify} in each DEPLOYING repo, keep [] in repos that deploy nothing. objectivesRegistry is the canonical co-mingled KB hub path; leave as ~/.claude/pipeline/objectives.md unless you relocate the KB. requiredCheck (optional, omitted here) names a CI check /land-ticket's merge gate waits for in repos with branch protection.
